/.title: Orvix — Email hosting for teams that need it to work
/.description: Professional email hosting with custom domains, encrypted transport, DKIM, MFA, and admin controls. Start free with up to 5 mailboxes on 1 domain.

/pricing.title: Pricing — Orvix
/pricing.description: Orvix plans start free and scale from $9.99 per month. Compare the real plan catalog, limits, and included capabilities.

/features.title: Features — Orvix
/features.description: Explore Orvix email hosting capabilities across the plan catalog, including custom domains, DKIM, MTA-STS, backups, MFA, and audit logs.

/enterprise.title: Enterprise — Orvix
/enterprise.description: Orvix Enterprise supports up to 100 domains, 1,000 mailboxes, 1 TB storage, 100,000 sends per day, SSO, SLA, and priority support.

/security.title: Security — Orvix
/security.description: Review Orvix transport security, domain authentication, MFA, audit logging, backup controls, and responsible disclosure information.

/docs.title: Documentation — Orvix
/docs.description: Find Orvix guides for setup, DNS, mailboxes, security, billing, and API use.

/api.title: API — Orvix
/api.description: Review the documented Orvix REST API surface for health, authentication, domains, and mailboxes.

/status.title: Service status — Orvix
/status.description: Check the current public Orvix health endpoint and find the incident contact path.
